steps.title: Match the student goal
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a similarity between Baxter and Aster. A similarity must use information about both specimens, not just a general fact about fossils. The notes say Baxter is a Tyrannosaurus, Aster is a Triceratops, and both lived in the Late Cretaceous period.

steps.title: Reject non-similar details
steps.content: Choice B emphasizes different locations, so it highlights a contrast. Choice C gives a broad fact about fossil specimens and mentions only one relevant museum. Choice D discusses only Baxter and does not compare the two specimens. The answer is A.
